markdown:
#  Commitments 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work). 
[What granular permissions are available for the project's Commitments tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-projects-commitments-tool)  
| Add a Line Item to a Commitment's Schedule of Values   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

OR

  * Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Change Events tool.
  * A DocuSign© account is required.

title: Permissions
description: This page lists the user permissions that are required to perform actions in or related to the project's Commitments tool.
